title: Enumerated type variable .name() method causes lifetime unknown Internal Error

features.name: enum variable .name() method call
features.description: Code should include a call to the .name() method on an enumerated type variable to convert the enum value to its string representation

features.name: enum .name() inside fork block
features.description: Code should include a .name() call on an enum variable placed inside a fork/join_any or fork/join_none block
features.snippet:
fork
  begin
    $error("profile %s not supported", pwr_profile.name());
  end
join_any

features.name: enum in case statement with default arm using .name()
features.description: Code should include a case statement on an enum variable where the default arm calls .name() to print the enum value as a string
features.snippet:
case (pwr_profile)
  PWR_DC: begin end
  PWR_SQUARE_WAVE: begin end
  default: $error("not supported %s", pwr_profile.name());
endcase
